name: file-uploader
title: Openinary File Uploader
author: Openinary
description: Secure drag-and-drop file uploader for self-hosted Openinary instances. Uploads with a short-lived presigned signature from POST /upload/sign, no API key in the browser.
docs: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_OPENINARY_URL to your Openinary API URL, then create a signing endpoint with @openinary/upload-token. Full guide: https://openinary.dev/docs/guides/file-uploader
